data.title: A Phase 2 Pilot Study of the Safety, Pharmacokinetics, and Pharmacodynamics of ARC1779 Injection in Patients With Von Willebrand Factor-Related Platelet Function Disorders
data.brief_summary: To evaluate the overall safety and tolerability of ARC1779, a therapeutic oligonucleotide ("aptamer") in patients with three types of von Willebrand Factor related platelet disorders.
endpoints: To establish the overall safety and tolerability of ARC1779 in three varieties of von Willebrand Factor (vWF)-related platelet function disorders
